creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 187251
psm snippet from 9470m dmesg (w/ synaptics-identify-0x46.patch)

Unfortunately, the patch did not work. The trackpad is still detected as a Generic PS/2 Mouse and two-finger scrolling does not work.

I attached psm snippets from dmesg with the patch synaptics-identify-0x46.patch.
